name: AB Vilkyskiu pienine
summary: AB Vilkyskiu pienine, together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells various types of cheese in Lithuania, rest of the European Union, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Cheese, Cheese Products and Other; Dry Milk Products; and Fresh Milk Products. The company offers fermented, mozzarella, mould, smoked, melt, cottage, and other cheese products; and milk, sour creams, glazed curd bars, butter, kefir, yogurts, dry milk, and whey products. It also leases buildings. AB Vilkyskiu pienine was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Vilky√Ç¬ökiai, Lithuania.
